purpose: Tighten A-FIX outcome truthfulness and reduce confusion before Phase B (Trust Engine)

wins.title: Outcome mapping correctness
wins.description: Map success/partial/error based on executed tests: success=pass & counts>0; partial=fail & counts>0; error=else (not-run/system error/files=0)

changes.note: Fix computeOutcome + adjust error copy for not-run

wins.title: Repair artifact completeness retry
wins.description: Auto re-ask exactly once when artifacts omit file contents (Missing contents …)
